goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'asian oriental' food and should be in the 'west'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'british' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '2 people' at '17:45' on 'saturday'.
If the booking fails how about 'friday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free parking'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'phone number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve asian oriental food and should be in the west
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves british food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 2 people at 17:45 on saturday
If the booking fails how about friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and doesn't need to have free parking
The hotel should have a star of 3 and should be in the type of guesthouse
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free parking
Make sure you get area and phone number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
